title: trisetum trinii
intro: Trisetum trinii, also known as Trin's hair grass, is a species of grass native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and protect the body. The health benefits of Trisetum trinii include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent to aid in wound healing. Trisetum trinii can be prepared as a tea or infusion for oral consumption, and its extracts can also be used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
